# Graphs and Structural Analysis {#ch-graphs}

<!-- DEVELOPMENT OUTLINE: original chapter contained only its title. -->

## Graphs as Data

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-graphs-as-data)
to turn **Graphs as Data** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Paths, Connectivity, and Traversal

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-paths-connectivity-and-traversal)
to turn **Paths, Connectivity, and Traversal** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Centrality and Influence

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-centrality-and-influence)
to turn **Centrality and Influence** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Communities and Structural Roles

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-communities-and-structural-roles)
to turn **Communities and Structural Roles** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Link Prediction

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-link-prediction)
to turn **Link Prediction** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## From Graph Features to Graph Learning

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/13-graphs-and-structural-analysis.qmd#sec-pr-13-from-graph-features-to-graph-learning)
to turn **From Graph Features to Graph Learning** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Summary, Exercises, and Lab
